signIn.headline: Read once. Ask anything.
signIn.subhead: A private notebook for everything in your inbox.
signIn.errorTryAgain: Sign-in didn't go through. Please try again.
signIn.microcopy: No card required. 2-minute setup. Your data stays in your Drive.

feed.title: Inbox
feed.empty: We're watching for your first email.

subjects.navEmpty: No subjects yet — we'll add one when your first watched email arrives.
subjects.detailEmpty: No items in this subject yet.

watchedSenders.label: Watched senders
watchedSenders.helpText: We summarize emails from these senders or domains. Use a full address (alice@example.com) or a domain (@acme.com).
watchedSenders.empty: No watched senders yet. Add one below.
watchedSenders.saveError: We couldn't save your changes. Please try again.

validation.tooLong: Each entry must be 255 characters or fewer.
validation.invalidFormat: Use an email address or a domain like acme.com or @acme.com.
validation.listFull: You can watch up to 200 senders or domains.

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.helpText: Pick where Shomery sends you new summaries.
notifications.saveError: We couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
notifications.telegramRequiresChatId: Add a Telegram chat ID to enable this channel.

emailDigest.label: Email digest
emailDigest.helpText: A daily roundup of new summaries to your account email.

welcome.headline: Welcome to Shomery.
welcome.body: We'll watch the senders you choose, summarize what arrives, and answer questions grounded in your own inbox.

connect.title: Your inbox is connected.
connect.body: We use the Google account you signed in with to read emails as they arrive. Nothing leaves your account uninvited.

watch.title: Who should we watch?
watch.body: Add the senders or domains worth summarizing. You can change this anytime in Settings.
watch.minRequired: Add at least one sender or domain to continue.
watch.saveError: We couldn't save your list. Please try again.

save.title: Where summaries live.
save.body: For now we keep your summaries inside Shomery. Once Drive verification clears, we'll save them straight to your chosen folder.
save.completeError: We couldn't finish setup. Please try again.
